data.name: FooterTagline
data.value: Empowering communities to report, track, and resolve infrastructure issues together.

data.name: JoinThousands
data.value: Join thousands of citizens making a difference. Report infrastructure problems, track their resolution in real-time, and help build stronger communities.

data.name: NoCitiesMessage
data.value: There are no cities available for the selected country. Try a different region.

data.name: DiscoverCitiesDesc
data.value: Discover cities across the globe and track infrastructure issues reported by engaged community members.

data.name: CelebratateTopContributors
data.value: Celebrate the top contributors making our cities better

data.name: TakePhotoPin
data.value: Take a photo, pin the location on a map, and submit a detailed report in seconds.

data.name: WatchIssuesProgress
data.value: Watch issues progress from reported to resolved with live status updates.

data.name: UpvoteIssuesComment
data.value: Upvote important issues, comment with insights, and collaborate with neighbors.

data.name: GetNotifiedWhenResolved
data.value: Get notified when issues are resolved and see your community improve.

data.name: ReportTrackResolve
data.value: Report, track, and resolve infrastructure issues together

data.name: EveryReportStatusVisible
data.value: Every report, status change, and action is visible to the community.

data.name: CommunityReportingAccelerates
data.value: Community reporting accelerates problem identification and prioritization.

data.name: YourVoiceMatters
data.value: Your voice matters. Vote up important issues and shape priorities.

data.name: InfrastructureDecisionsBackedBy
data.value: Infrastructure decisions backed by real community input and analytics.

data.name: ReportAndTrackInfrastructure
data.value: Report and track civic infrastructure problems in your area

data.name: SampleIssueDescription
data.value: Large pothole near intersection causing traffic issues...

data.name: DeletingIssueWillRemoveIt
data.value: Deleting this issue will remove it from public view, but your deletion will be recorded.

data.name: ItWillNoLongerAppear
data.value: It will no longer appear in issue listings

data.name: OtherUsersWillNotBeSeeIt
data.value: Other users will not be able to see it

data.name: CommentsAndVotesWillBePreserved
data.value: Comments and votes will be preserved internally

data.name: AdminsCanRestoreDeletedIssues
data.value: Admins can restore deleted issues if needed

data.name: IfYouDeleteThisByMistake
data.value: If you delete this by mistake, please contact an administrator. They may be able to restore it.

data.name: IssueNotFound
data.value: Issue not found or has been deleted.

data.name: MapClick
data.value: Click on any marker to view the issue details

data.name: UseThisPagePagePrivacy
data.value: Use this page to detail your site's privacy policy.

data.name: YourReportWillBeReviewed
data.value: Your report will be reviewed by city officials.

data.name: BeAsSpecificAsPossible
data.value: Be as specific as possible — a clear title, accurate location, and photos significantly speed up the resolution process.

data.name: GiveThemeAClearTitleAndDescription
data.value: Give the issue a clear title and description

data.name: ExamplePotholeOnMainStreet
data.value: e.g., Pothole on Main Street near the library

data.name: DescribeTheIssueInDetail
data.value: Describe the issue in detail — when you noticed it, how severe it is, any safety concerns, and anything else that might be helpful…

data.name: PinTheExactSpotOnTheMap
data.value: Pin the exact spot on the map

data.name: AddressAutoFilled
data.value: Address is auto-filled when you pin the map

data.name: ReverseGeocodedFromYourMapPin
data.value: Reverse geocoded from your map pin

data.name: ClickTheMapToPlacePin
data.value: Click the map to place a pin

data.name: UsuallyAutoSelectedFromYourMapPin
data.value: Usually auto-selected from your map pin

data.name: VisualEvidenceHelpsOfficials
data.value: Visual evidence helps city officials act faster

data.name: DropFilesHereOrBrowseToUpload
data.value: Drop files here or browse to upload

data.name: UploadFileInfo
data.value: Up to 10 files — Images up to 5 MB each · Videos up to 100 MB each

data.name: VisibleToPublicAndCityOfficials
data.value: Visible to the public & city officials after review

data.name: MonitorHealthMetrics
data.value: Monitor community engagement and infrastructure health metrics

data.name: DeletingThisIssue
data.value: Deleting this issue will remove it from public view, but your deletion will be recorded.

data.name: ItWillNoLongerAppearInIssueListings
data.value: It will no longer appear in issue listings

data.name: IssueNotFoundMessage
data.value: Issue not found or has already been deleted.

data.name: NoIssuesFoundMessage
data.value: No issues to display. Be the first to report one!

data.name: SelectYourCityToPersonalizeFeatureContent
data.value: Select your city to personalize feature content

data.name: LinkOAuthProvidersAndManageAuthenticationMethods
data.value: Link OAuth providers and manage authentication methods

data.name: ControlWhichEmailsAndNotificationsYouReceive
data.value: Control which emails and notifications you receive

data.name: AnonymousReportingHazardAlertsAndProfileVisibility
data.value: Anonymous reporting, hazard alerts, and profile visibility

data.name: ChangePasswordManageProfileAndAccountSecurity
data.value: Change password, manage profile, and account security

data.name: SearchByEmailUsernameOrName
data.value: Search by email, username, or name...

data.name: PinTheExactSpotOnTheMapDescription
data.value: Pin the exact spot on the map

data.name: ManageYourProfileAndAccountSettings
data.value: Manage your profile and account settings

data.name: SignInToContinueMakingYourCommunityBetter
data.value: Sign in to continue making your community better

data.name: WorkTogetherToImproveYourNeighborhood
data.value: Work together to improve your neighborhood

data.name: YourDataIsSecureAndEncrypted
data.value: Your data is secure and encrypted

data.name: ClickOnTheMapToSelectCoordinates
data.value: Click on the map to select coordinates

data.name: NoIssuesReportedYet
data.value: No issues have been reported yet

data.name: BeTheFirstToMakeYourCommunityBetter
data.value: Be the first to make your community better!

data.name: BeTheFirstToShareYourThoughts
data.value: Be the first to share your thoughts

data.name: BeTheFirstToContributeAndClaimYourSpot
data.value: Be the first to contribute and claim your spot!

data.name: AddYourFirstCityToGetStarted
data.value: Add your first city to get started

data.name: ThisIsHowOtherUsersWillSeeYou
data.value: This is how other users will see you

data.name: SignInToJoinTheConversation
data.value: Sign in to join the conversation

data.name: SignInToCastYourVote
data.value: Sign in to cast your vote

data.name: YouCanSignInWithEmailAndPassword
data.value: You can sign in with email and password

data.name: ManageYourAuthenticationMethodsAndLinkedProviders
data.value: Manage your authentication methods and linked providers

data.name: NoAchievementsYetMessage
data.value: No achievements yet. Keep contributing to unlock achievements!

data.name: UserNotFoundMessage
data.value: This user does not exist or has no reputation record yet.

data.name: TurnOnOrOffAllEmailNotificationsFromFixIt
data.value: Turn on or off all email notifications from FixIt

data.name: GetWeeklyCommunityHealthMetrics
data.value: Get weekly community health metrics and insights for your city

data.name: RemindersAboutOpenIssuesInYourArea
data.value: Reminders about open issues in your area that need attention

data.name: InstantAlertsWhenHazardsAreReportedNearYou
data.value: Instant alerts when hazards are reported near you

data.name: SwappingToDevelopmentEnvironment
data.value: Swapping to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: NoResultsMatchYourCurrentFilters
data.value: No results match your current filters. Try adjusting your search or clearing the filters.

data.name: ByCreatingAnAccountYouAgreeTo
data.value: By creating an account, you agree to our

data.name: PleaseSelectACity
data.value: Please select a city — try clicking a location on the map first

data.name: OnlyAdminsAndModeratorsCanAccessThisPanel
data.value: Only admins and moderators can access this panel

data.name: YourReportsWillShowAsAnonymous
data.value: Your reports will show as "Anonymous" on the map and in lists

data.name: ExploreInfrastructureIssuesInCity
data.value: Explore infrastructure issues and community reports in {0}.

data.name: NoIssuesInCity
data.value: Great news — this city currently has no reported infrastructure issues.

data.name: ManageYourAccountAndPreferences
data.value: Manage your account, preferences, and more

data.name: CityPreferenceInfo
data.value: This city will be used for Issue Forecasting, SLA Compliance, Campaigns, and other feature pages.

data.name: TakePhotoAddLocation
data.value: Take a photo, add location, and submit in seconds

data.name: SeeRealTimeUpdates
data.value: See real-time updates on reported issues

data.name: ManageYourPrivacyPreferencesAndSafety
data.value: Manage your privacy preferences and safety features

data.name: AnonymousReportingDescription
data.value: Report hazards and issues without revealing your identity to the public. Your information is only visible to administrators.

data.name: NameNotVisiblePublicly
data.value: Your name and profile will not be visible publicly

data.name: AdminsCanContactYou
data.value: Administrators can contact you if they need more information

data.name: EarnReputationPoints
data.value: You can still earn reputation points for helpful reports

data.name: CustomizeHazardNotifications
data.value: Customize how you receive hazard and safety notifications

data.name: BeNotifiedOfCrimeReports
data.value: Be notified of reported crimes in your area

data.name: BeNotifiedOfTrafficHazards
data.value: Be notified of accidents and traffic hazards

data.name: BeNotifiedOfInfrastructureProblems
data.value: Be notified of potholes, broken lights, and damage

data.name: NotifyForAllHazards
data.value: Receive notifications for all types of hazards

data.name: AlertsWithinDistance
data.value: You'll receive alerts for hazards within this distance

data.name: OnlyBeNotifiedAboveSeverity
data.value: Only be notified of hazards at or above this severity level

data.name: ControlWhoCanSeeYourProfile
data.value: Control who can see your profile and contributions

data.name: PublicProfileDescription
data.value: Anyone can view your profile and contributions

data.name: PrivateProfileDescription
data.value: Only you and administrators can view your profile

data.name: PrivateProfileDoesNotAffectReputation
data.value: Making your profile private doesn't affect your reputation or contributions to the community. It only affects who can see your profile page.

data.name: AnalysisUnavailableCopy
data.value: We couldn't load analysis details right now. Please try again in a moment.

data.name: CommentPlaceholder
data.value: Add context, updates, or helpful details for your neighbors and city teams...

data.name: CreateDescriptionValidation
data.value: Please add a little more detail so others can understand the issue.

data.name: CreateTitleValidation
data.value: Add a clear title with at least 3 characters.

data.name: DeleteCommentError
data.value: Something went wrong while deleting the comment.

data.name: DeleteCommentFailed
data.value: We couldn't delete that comment right now.

data.name: DeleteOwnCommentsOnly
data.value: You can only delete your own comments.

data.name: EditChecklistAddress
data.value: Confirm the location still points people to the right place.

data.name: EditChecklistDescription
data.value: Make sure the description reflects the latest context and impact.

data.name: EditGuidanceCopy
data.value: Use this space to clarify what changed, improve context, or make the report easier for others to act on.

data.name: EditIssueCopy
data.value: Refine the report so neighbors, city teams, and moderators can understand it quickly.

data.name: EditIssueFormCopy
data.value: Keep the report precise, current, and easy to scan.

data.name: FeaturedCommunityActivityCopy
data.value: Follow recent reports, active fixes, and the places where residents are already making progress together.

data.name: GeneratingAiAnalysisCopy
data.value: Our system is reviewing the report and preparing a structured summary of the issue.

data.name: HomeHeroDescription
data.value: Help your city move faster. Report infrastructure problems, rally community attention, and follow progress from first report to final fix.

data.name: HomeProcessCopy
data.value: Designed to make reporting simple for residents and actionable for teams, with every step visible from submission to resolution.

data.name: HomeTrustCopy
data.value: Clear reporting, visible progress, and shared accountability help communities solve more problems with less friction.

data.name: ImageUploadLimit
data.value: You can upload up to 8 images.

data.name: InvalidFileType
data.value: This file type is not supported. Please upload images or videos only.

data.name: IssuesDiscoveryCopy
data.value: Explore reports from across the community, find the problems that matter most, and filter the feed to the issues you can help move forward.

data.name: NoSuggestionsAvailableYet
data.value: Suggestions will appear after you add a title and description.

data.name: OnlyFirstTenFiles
data.value: Only the first 10 files will be included.

data.name: ReadyToMakeADifferenceCopy
data.value: Start a report in minutes, support the issues that matter near you, and help your community turn visibility into action.

data.name: SuggestedTagsHint
data.value: Suggested from your description and title.

data.name: TagsHint
data.value: Separate tags with commas to help categorize the report.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: VideoUploadLimit
data.value: You can upload up to 2 videos.
